description_long: This is a medium-sized ceramic bowl with a gently sloping, wide rim and a shallow depth. The exterior features a warm, wood-like brown finish, while the interior is glazed in a glossy white with a blue-green botanical motif resembling palm or fern leaves. The decorative pattern is concentrated on one side of the inner surface, creating an asymmetrical visual interest. The bowl's surface appears smooth and reflective, typical of glazed ceramics. There are no visible handles, feet, or additional structural features. The overall condition of the bowl is pristine, with no visible chips, cracks, or signs of wear.
description: A glossy white ceramic bowl with a wood-toned exterior and blue-green botanical pattern inside, in pristine condition.
description_view_0: The bowl is seen from an angle highlighting the white interior and a partial view of the blue-green leaf motif on the left side.
description_view_1: This view shows the bowl with the blue-green botanical pattern more fully visible across the inner surface.
description_view_2: The bowl is rotated to display the majority of the blue-green pattern, emphasizing its spread across the interior.
description_view_3: The bowl is turned so that only a small portion of the blue-green motif is visible on the right, with mostly plain white interior showing.
attribute_context_of_use: serving food or holding small items
attribute_decorative_patterns: Blue-green botanical leaf motif on the interior surface, asymmetrically placed.
